name: Mexican Rice Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl; stir until well blended.
2. Transfer about 1 1/2 cups of the mix to three 1-pint airtight containers and label as Mexican Rice Mix.
3. Store the containers in a cool, dry place and use within 6 to 8 months.
Makes about 4 1/2 cups of mix.
Instructions for cooking:
1. To prepare Mexican Rice, combine 1 1/2 cups of the mix, 2 cups cold water, and 1 tablespoon butter or margarine in a medium saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat; cover and reduce heat.
3. Cook for 15 to 25 minutes, until liquid is absorbed.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
